title: Iso World Builder
description: Isometric tile-painting sandbox — build terrain worlds with 12 tile types, height sculpting, and 6 biome generators.
concept: Iso World Builder is a full isometric map editor built on Canvas 2D. Paint from 12 tile types (grass, water, lava, crystal, gold...) at up to 5 elevation levels. Six terrain generators spawn ready-made biomes — plains, volcanic crater, crystal caves, ocean island, winter ridge, desert. Four tools (paint, flood-fill, eyedropper, erase), undo/redo with 60-step history, zoom/pan, localStorage persistence, and PNG export.
features: 12 tile types with animated water and lava
Height system (0–5 levels) with isometric 3D walls
4 tools: Paint, Flood Fill, Eyedropper, Erase
6 biome terrain generators (Plains, Ocean, Winter, Volcano, Desert, Crystal)
Zoom/pan (scroll + drag) with pinch-to-zoom on mobile

interaction.mouse: Hover to see tile under cursor
interaction.click: Click/drag to paint tiles; scroll to zoom; alt+drag or middle-drag to pan
interaction.touch: Tap/drag to paint; pinch to zoom; two-finger drag to pan
interaction.keyboard: Z=undo X=redo P=paint E=erase F=fill I=eyedropper [/]=height 1–9=tile
